section.title: NAME
section.p: update - update the queried document set.

plentry.pd: update rule, document will be update by it.

set true if want to return updated document.
Format The parameter 'update' is same with parameter 'rule' of SdbCollection.update(). see [db.collectionspace.collection.update()]. The parameter 'returnnew' is optional, default is false. when set it as true, the query will return updated document rather than original.

section.title: Examples
section.p: query from collection 'bar' where age is large than 10, and increase field 'age' by 1 for documents satified the condition.

note.p: can not be called simultaneously with query.count(), query.remove().
sorting must use index when called with query.sort() in a single node.
query must be ensured to run in a single node or a singe sub-collection when query.update() is called simultaneously with query.limit() or query.skip() in cluster.
